mapper.select: SELECT 'LESSON' AS source_type, cn.title AS node_title, l.title AS title, COALESCE(NULLIF(l.summary, ''), LEFT(l.content, 500)) AS summary, l.example_code AS example_code, (cn.sort_order * 100 + l.sort_order) AS sort_order FROM user_lesson_progress ulp JOIN lessons l ON l.lesson_id = ulp.lesson_id JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = l.node_id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} AND cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.level_code = #{levelCode} AND cn.node_type = 'PLANET' AND ulp.theory_completed = 1 AND ulp.practice_passed = 1 AND cn.is_active = 1 AND l.is_active = 1 AND l.required_for_completion = 1 ORDER BY cn.sort_order ASC, l.sort_order ASC, l.lesson_id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = l.node_id WHERE cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.level_code = #{levelCode} AND cn.node_type = 'PLANET' AND cn.is_active = 1 AND l.is_active = 1 AND l.required_for_completion = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS incomplete_required_lesson_count FROM lessons l JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = l.node_id LEFT JOIN user_lesson_progress ulp ON ulp.lesson_id = l.lesson_id AND ulp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE cn.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.level_code = #{levelCode} AND cn.node_type = 'PLANET' AND cn.is_active = 1 AND l.is_active = 1 AND l.required_for_completion = 1 AND NOT ( COALESCE(ulp.theory_completed, 0) = 1 AND COALESCE(ulp.practice_passed, 0) = 1 )
